title: No Touching at All
original_title: どうしても触れたくない
overview: Toshiaki is a young gay man. On the first day of work, he meets Yosuke in the elevator. Yosuke is Toshiaki's new boss. Toshiaki is attracted to Yosuke. Toshiaki can't be honest with his feelings about it due to a traumatic incident from his past.

trailers.title: どうしても触れたくない　予告編

trailer_groups.title: どうしても触れたくない　予告編

en.title: どうしても触れたくない　予告編
